title: storage: remove aufs driver
body:
There are no signs that anyone still uses aufs, no major distro seem to support it so let's remove it and it hasn't been tested in CI for over for years[1].

Remove the driver code and config fields for it. There are still a bunch of references in pkg/archive which I have kept as I am not sure how much of that still applies.

[1] https://github.com/containers/storage/commit/a54d4e3a4bfbc823e69ef06439ed1cef2658674a

Fixes: #342
